projectDescription: AI-powered mobile wallet for Solana that transforms blockchain interactions into natural language conversations.
keyFeatures: AI-powered chat interface for blockchain interactions
Mobile Wallet Adapter integration with Solana Mobile Stack
DeFi operations (Jupiter swaps, staking, RainFi loans)
publicApiSurface: SolanaAgentKit - Core agent class for blockchain operations
agentBuilder - Factory function for creating configured agent instances
createLangchainTools - Generate LangChain-compatible tools from agent
createVercelAITools - Generate Vercel AI SDK tools from agent
TokenPlugin - Plugin for token operations (transfer, balance, swap, stake)
DefiPlugin - Plugin for DeFi operations (loans, repayment)
get_balance - Get SOL balance for wallet
get_token_balance - Get SPL token balances
transfer - Transfer SOL or SPL tokens
trade - Execute token swaps via Jupiter
stakeWithJup - Stake tokens with Jupiter
fetchPrice - Get token price data
GetUserLoans - Retrieve RainFi loan information
RepayLoan - Repay RainFi loans
quoteLoanCalculator - Calculate loan quotes
getTPS - Get current network TPS
request_faucet_funds - Request devnet/testnet airdrops
closeEmptyTokenAccounts - Close empty token accounts
getWalletAddress - Get wallet public key
useAgent - React hook for AI agent integration
useMultiChat - React hook for managing multiple chat sessions
useAuthorization - React hook for wallet authorization
useMobileWallet - React hook for Mobile Wallet Adapter
